subjects.description: An adult pedestrian standing still on the wet stone sidewalk curb, facing the oncoming ego vehicle, wearing a white short-sleeve t-shirt with a large red octagonal stop sign graphic printed across the chest.
subjects.appearance_details: Casual spring attire with dark trousers and canvas shoes; the bold stop sign graphic dominates the shirt's front, brightly lit as the sun breaks through.
subjects.relationship: The primary point of interest for the ego vehicle as it passes; remains stationary relative to the moving camera.
subjects.location: Initially center-right background, moving toward right midground and then right foreground as the car approaches and passes.
subjects.relative_size: Small within frame initially, growing to Medium as the vehicle nears.
subjects.orientation: Facing the camera (the ego vehicle) directly, front toward the lens.
subjects.pose: Standing upright, feet planted on the curb, arms relaxed at sides, head oriented toward the approaching car.
subjects.action: Standing still on the curb, watching the ego vehicle pass without stepping into the road.
subjects.state_changes: No significant change; remains stationary on the curb throughout, never entering the vehicle's lane.
subjects.clothing: White short-sleeve t-shirt with a printed red stop sign, dark trousers, canvas shoes.
subjects.expression: Calm, neutral, attentive gaze toward the vehicle.
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: Fair skin tone with a smooth complexion, brightly lit under the emerging midday sun.
subjects.facial_features: Short light-brown hair, light eyes, relaxed brow, no distinguishing marks visible at distance.

background_setting: A tree-lined European boulevard at midday just after rain, with clouds breaking to let bright light through. The wet fresh asphalt glistens and holds shallow puddles that mirror the sky, bordered by wet stone sidewalks, budding spring street trees, stucco townhouses, iron railings, and lamp posts. Bright sun breaks between clearing clouds, throwing bright reflections on the wet road, conveying a fresh, rain-washed spring midday scene.

lighting.conditions: Bright midday with clouds breaking after rain; sun emerging between clouds.
lighting.direction: High emerging sun slightly behind the ego vehicle, front-lighting the pedestrian, with bright reflections bouncing off the wet road.
lighting.shadows: Moderate, freshly returning shadows under the emerging sun; wet asphalt and puddles throw bright specular reflections.
lighting.illumination_effect: Bright, freshly washed illumination with strong wet reflections; the red stop sign shirt graphic reads sharply against the glistening scene.

aesthetics.composition: Forward-facing dashcam perspective down the wet tree-lined boulevard, the pedestrian on the right wet stone sidewalk; puddle reflections and lane markings lead toward the vanishing point.
aesthetics.color_scheme: Bright sky and fresh spring green reflected in glistening wet asphalt, stucco facades, with the red stop sign on the white shirt as a vivid focal accent doubled in the puddles.
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating budding trees, iron railings, puddle reflections, and evenly spaced lamp posts.

cinematography.camera_motion: Smooth forward tracking shot as the ego vehicle drives steadily down the lane.
cinematography.framing: Wide shot showing the road, sidewalk, and surroundings from the driver's viewpoint.
cinematography.camera_angle: Eye-level dashcam perspective from inside the vehicle.
cinematography.focus: Sharp across the wet boulevard, with the pedestrian clearly resolved amid bright wet reflections.
cinematography.lens_focal_length: Wide-angle, approximately 24mm equivalent typical of a dashcam.

context: Autonomous driving / ADAS scenario on a rain-washed European boulevard at midday demonstrating a stationary pedestrian on the curb with a distracting stop-sign graphic on clothing, while the ego vehicle correctly continues at speed in its lane.

actions.description: The ego vehicle drives smoothly forward along the wet tree-lined boulevard as clouds break after rain; the pedestrian appears ahead on the right wet sidewalk, facing the vehicle, with a stop sign clearly visible on their shirt.
The vehicle continues approaching at a steady speed over the glistening road; the pedestrian grows larger in frame but stays stationary on the wet curb.
The ego vehicle drives smoothly past the pedestrian, maintaining its lane and speed on the wet fresh asphalt; the pedestrian remains on the curb and never enters the road.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: White bold uppercase letters centered on a red octagonal sign graphic printed on the pedestrian's white t-shirt.
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the pedestrian's chest, visible on the right side of frame throughout the approach and pass.
text_and_signage_elements.context: A decorative stop-sign graphic on clothing that resembles a traffic sign but is not an actual traffic control device.

segments.description: The ego vehicle travels forward in its lane on wet fresh asphalt with puddle reflections as sun breaks through after rain, approaching the stationary pedestrian on the right wet stone curb whose shirt displays a stop sign.
segments.key_changes: The pedestrian grows progressively larger in frame as the vehicle approaches over the glistening road; vehicle speed remains steady.
segments.camera: Smooth forward tracking motion at constant speed, eye-level dashcam view with bright wet reflections.

segments.description: The ego vehicle drives smoothly past the pedestrian without slowing, staying in its lane; the pedestrian remains on the wet curb and does not step into the road.
segments.key_changes: Pedestrian passes from midground to right foreground and out of frame; vehicle maintains speed and lane position over the wet road.
segments.camera: Continued smooth forward tracking, no deceleration or steering away.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam view shows a rain-washed European boulevard of glistening wet asphalt with budding spring trees as clouds break, the ego vehicle moving steadily forward; a pedestrian stands on the right wet sidewalk facing the camera, a red stop sign clearly printed on their white shirt. By 0:01-0:02 the pedestrian grows larger as the vehicle approaches at constant speed, remaining planted on the wet curb amid bright reflections. Around 0:03 the vehicle continues smoothly without slowing, keeping its lane. From 0:03 to 0:05 the ego vehicle drives past the stationary pedestrian, who never steps into the lane, and the pedestrian shifts to the right foreground before leaving frame as the wet boulevard continues ahead.
audio_description: Ambient after-rain boulevard driving sounds: a steady engine hum, the wet hiss of tires on glistening asphalt, occasional drips from trees, and distant traffic. No speech and no music; the audio remains consistent with a smooth, uninterrupted drive.
